/CAL:APD MISD RESTITUTION REPORT/RESTR/X:RESTITUTION TO THE VICTIM, JOHNCHEONG, REMAIN A GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTION TO BE DETERMINED BY THE COURT/CONTPROB/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:NO FURTHER APPEARANCES/

/CAL  SENTENCE/TWS/CH2 ISS CPROB PROB 1 Y PJ  7 D/CTS  7  /VF2 150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/X: DEFENDANT MUST NOT POSSESS BURGLARY TOOLS/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:06-22-22/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOPU: ATTYAUTHORITY/

/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/VD: 04-21-22/X: LOVE WAIVER REQUESTED BY DA AND DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NOAPPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO04-15-22/X: BAIL SET AT $15000/

/CAL:PHC/X:DEFENDANT IS IN CUSTODY IN LAKE COUNTY/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:25,000/NIGHTSERV/X:NO CITE/X:PEOPLE DO NOT OBJECT RELEASING DEFENDANT ON  ORCT  WHEN SHE IS RETURNED TO COURT/X:COURT RETAINS THE 60TH LAST DAY OF 04-25-22/VD:03-07-22 HEARING/

601/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:03-09-22 (10TH)/X: THE 60TH DAY IS 04-25-22/DEF: CUSTODY STATUS ADDRESSED/OR/X: THE COURT RELEASES THE DEFENDANT ON O,R, TO ALLOW THE DEFENDANT TO BE TRANSPORTED TO ADDRESS OUT OF COUNTY WARRANTS,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE 03-02-22 IN DEPT 09/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING 03-07-22 IN DEPT 09/DOP/DEF: ADMONISHED TO RETURN TO COURT IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCOIF THE DEFENDANT IS RELEASED FROM THE OUT OF COUNTY JURISDICTIONS,/
